issues.detail: The clause "for each project" is covered only with populated fixtures. No P0 covers pre-assignment/pre-task projects with no volunteer, zero total tasks, no current task, or no last commit, so an implementation that omits these projects or fabricates values could pass.
issues.fix: Add a P0 using pre-match/pre-task and terminal projects; assert every project remains listed and unavailable fields use defined, non-fabricated empty states. Define and test the zero-total progress result.

issues.detail: The fixture says "a general balance from a released project," but the PRD states that on volunteer release "remaining fuel stays on the project" and that release to general balance occurs only at completion or cancellation.
issues.fix: Use a completed or cancelled project after provider final-cost settlement, or seed a general-balance ledger entry without claiming volunteer release created it.

issues.detail: The delegation "AT-001 the no-cash-out invariant" points to the wrong suite. AT-REQ-001 covers authentication and acknowledgment identity capture; the no-cash-out invariant is owned by AT-006.37.
issues.fix: Replace the AT-001 delegation with AT-006.37 or AT-REQ-006.

issues.detail: The assertion that items appear on a "prominent needs-action surface" merely repeats the qualitative requirement and provides no observable criterion for prominence.
issues.fix: Define prominence observably, such as a top-level, initially expanded region with an accessible "Needs action" heading that is visible without opening a project detail or secondary panel.
